subject: [PATCH v4 07/21] mm: create scaffolds for the new virtual swap implementation

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch creates scaffolds for the new virtual swap implementation by adding a new mm/vswap.c source file, which currently only sets up an empty debugfs directory. It also hooks this up in the swap setup step and adds vswap compilation to the Makefile. Additionally, it makes Johannes Weiner a reviewer for virtual swap developments and updates the MAINTAINERS file accordingly.
